points: Lead digital accessibility reviews for course websites, LMS content, and instructional assets across public higher-education workflows, aligning deliverables with ADA, WCAG 2.1, and Section 508 requirements.

Audit HTML structure, heading hierarchy, form semantics, tables, alt text, captions, and document accessibility to improve compatibility with screen readers, keyboard navigation, and assistive technologies.

Collaborate with faculty and instructional teams to redesign course materials into accessible, semantically structured learning experiences with stronger content hierarchy and inclusive interaction patterns.
Improve remediation workflows for PDFs, presentations, and web content by standardizing accessibility checks, reusable markup patterns, and review templates for faster compliance turnaround.

Support accessibility automation efforts for repetitive checks, content tagging, and documentation workflows to reduce manual review overhead and improve consistency across large sets of educational resources.

experience.company: University at Buffalo (UB Media Forensic Lab)
points: Engineer production-facing web features using Flask, React, Jinja, and REST APIs, deployed behind Apache and WSGI on Ubuntu for research tooling used in applied media forensics workflows.

Integrated a context-aware AI assistant for guided workflow support, reducing friction in tool discovery and enabling faster navigation across specialized lab interfaces.
Diagnosed deployment, configuration, and environment issues across Linux-based infrastructure, strengthening application stability and maintainability in production-like setups.

Ran RAG evaluation experiments across hallucination reduction, grounding fidelity, and retrieval accuracy, comparing framework behavior and prompt strategies to improve answer reliability in production-oriented search systems.

Delivered a GPT-style chatbot product experience with conversation memory, context windows, query caching, response streaming, and assistant-like UI patterns inspired by modern AI-native tools such as ChatGPT and Perplexity.

Curated preference datasets and multimodal evaluation corpora for reward-modeling and alignment experiments, contributing to measurable improvements in benchmark win rates.
Strengthened model analysis workflows with repeatable evaluation infrastructure, enabling faster comparison of model behavior across prompt templates, datasets, and safety constraints.

Developed hybrid recommendation workflows and async inference APIs for low-latency model serving, improving precision@5 while maintaining production-style response targets.
Improved experimentation velocity by structuring reusable data preprocessing, training, and evaluation pipelines for marketplace analytics use cases.
Automated procurement workflows for 3D PPVC construction operations using Excel VBA macros, reducing manual sourcing and procurement processing time by approximately 60%.
Built vendor comparison models, pricing analysis sheets, and inventory tracking dashboards to support faster procurement decisions and cost-aware supplier selection.
Streamlined data collection and logistics tracking across supplier pipelines, improving visibility into quotations, lead times, and delivery coordination.
